name: UI Atlas Wave Validation
outcome_goal: Validate Moon and Atlas UI repairs together without mixing unrelated runtime/package work into the commit.
anti_requirements: Do not stage unrelated dirty files.
Do not commit if app tests or build fail.
Do not skip manual smoke for the known bad run graph.

jobs.label: run_app_unit_tests
jobs.prompt: Run the focused app test suite for Moon, Atlas, and shell registry. Capture failing tests with file-level cause.

jobs.label: run_app_build
jobs.prompt: Run the app build/type gate. Report any TypeScript, lint, or bundle failures.

jobs.label: manual_smoke_known_bad_runs
jobs.prompt: Smoke the known bad Moon run views and Atlas graph view. Confirm all nodes are visible, gates appear on edges, data-entry contracts populate, single/double-click behavior works, Cost Summary is absent from primary nav, and Atlas graph/table view is stable.

jobs.label: prepare_ui_commit
jobs.prompt: Review git status and produce the exact file list for the UI/Atlas commit. Exclude unrelated runtime/package/structured-document/infra changes.
